  Keep this PR focused on one logical change (see CONTRIBUTING.md).
  A large, multi-feature PR is hard to review — split it if you can.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Mark all that apply. Mirrors the conventional-commit types used in this repo. -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, deps, or housekeeping (no product behaviour change)
- [ ] `refactor` / `perf` / `test`
- [ ] Breaking change (describe the migration below)

## Changes

<!-- Bullet the notable changes. Group by backend / frontend / shared-types / docs if helpful. -->

-

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this? Commands run, cases covered, manual steps. -->

- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] Backend: `ruff` + `mypy` clean
- [ ] Manually verified the affected flow in the app

## Documentation & changelog

- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` (`## [Unreleased]`) if this is a user-facing change
- [ ] Updated relevant docs (`README.md`, `docs/`) if behaviour or setup changed
- [ ] Regenerated shared types (`npm run generate`) if any JSON Schema changed
